import numpy as np
from sentence_transformers import SentenceTransformer


model = SentenceTransformer("all-MiniLM-L6-v2")


def search_similar_documents(query: str, documents: list[str]) -> list[str]:
    query_embedding = model.encode(query)
    doc_embeddings = model.encode(documents)
    
    similarities = np.dot(doc_embeddings, query_embedding)
    top_indices = np.argsort(similarities)[::-1][:5]
    return [documents[i] for i in top_indices]


def get_recommendations(user_query: str, catalog: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    query_vec = model.encode(user_query)
    scores = []
    for item in catalog:
        item_vec = model.encode(item["description"])
        score = float(np.dot(query_vec, item_vec))
        scores.append((score, item))
    scores.sort(reverse=True)
    return [item for _, item in scores[:10]]
